TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Genzyumin na heci kbhun ku s'uli ga sazing hi nanak Genzyumin hiya. kyala smka s'uli Genzyumin ga, niya maki alang, kruma smka s'uli Genzyumin ga, rema wayan maki sku heci. pt'wagan heci ga hminas sku alang, ba balay hmuluy inlungan mrkyas tayan. mbaziy sali heci laha lga, mtyaw, msu'un sku utux b'ni ru mgla'i kya. nanu yasa, pyux Genzyumin mgla'i lla'i tikuy ru mrkyas sku heci misu ryax soni.
S.PHON: …£enzjumin na ńße ¶~ ®i kő≤ńßun ku s~…ē Ēuli …£a s~…ēaziŇč ńßi nanak …£enzjumin ńßija. kjala s~…ēmka s~…ē Ēuli …£enzjumin …£a, nija maki alaŇč, kruma s~…ēmka s~…ē Ēuli …£enzjumin …£a, rema wajan maki s~…ēku ńße ¶~ ®i. pt Ēwa…£an ńße ¶~ ®i …£a ńßminas~…ē s~…ēku alaŇč, ő≤a ő≤alaj ńßmuluj inluŇčan mrkjas~…ē tajan. mő≤azij s~…ēali ńße ¶~ ®i lańßa l…£a, mtjaw, ms~…ēu Ēun s~…ēku utux ő≤ Ēni ru m…£la Ēi kja. nanu jas~…ēa, pjux …£enzjumin m…£la Ēi lla Ēi tikuj ru mrkjas~…ē s~…ēku ńße ¶~ ®i mis~…ēu rjax s~…ēoni.
S.FORM: Genzyumin na heci kbhun ku s'uli ga sazing hi nanak Genzyumin hiya. kyala smka s'uli Genzyumin ga, niya maki alang, kruma smka s'uli Genzyumin ga, rema wayan maki sku heci. pt'wagan heci ga hminas sku alang, ba balay hmuluy inlungan mrkyas tayan. mbaziy sali heci laha lga, mtyaw, msu'un sku utux b'ni ru mgla'i kya. nanu yasa, pyux Genzyumin mgla'i lla'i tikuy ru mrkyas sku heci misu ryax soni.
